mapper.sql: id, order_no, owner_id, fault_type_id, title, description, images, appointment_time, address_detail, status, priority, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_order (order_no, owner_id, fault_type_id, title, description, images, appointment_time, address_detail, status, priority, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{ownerId}, #{faultTypeId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{images}, #{appointmentTime}, #{addressDetail}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(order_no) FROM repair_order WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM repair_order WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId}
